creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to alt2600 from comment #0)
But this will conflict when people have gnuplot-lite and not gnuplot.

If you want local documentation, why not installing it?

$ pkg search -x 'freebsd-doc-.*'
bn-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Bengali translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
da-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Danish translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
de-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      German translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
el-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Greek translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
en-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Documentation from the FreeBSD Documentation Project
es-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Spanish translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
fr-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      French translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
freebsd-doc-all-20241218,1     Documentation from the FreeBSD Documentation Project
hu-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Hungarian translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
id-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Indonesian translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
it-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Italian translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
ja-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Japanese translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
ko-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Korean translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
mn-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Mongolian translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
nl-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Dutch translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
pl-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Polish translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
pt-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Portuguese translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
ru-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Russian translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
tr-freebsd-doc-20241218,1      Turkish translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
zh_cn-freebsd-doc-20241218,1   Simplified Chinese translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project
zh_tw-freebsd-doc-20241218,1   Traditional Chinese translation of the FreeBSD Documentation Project


If you want to actually build it yourself, you need to do it in a clean environment (i.e. poudriere)
